name: Resilient
description: Setbacks roll off this artist like water. Stamina penalties from bad outcomes are softened. Effect: −15% to all incoming stamina penalties.

name: Quick Learner
description: Every decent show is a lesson. Solid performances pay out a little more than usual. Effect: +10% credits on OK payout outcomes.

name: Headliner
description: Born to be the main act. Earns a bonus when performing without a supporting lineup. Effect: +15% payout when this artist is the only one in the lineup.

name: Viral Moment
description: One incredible night can change everything. Great performances earn significantly more credits. Effect: +50% credits on GREAT payout outcomes.

name: Chart Topper
description: Mainstream appeal that translates directly to revenue. All payouts get a small boost. Effect: +10% credits on all non-zero payout outcomes.

name: Social Butterfly
description: Effortlessly sociable on and off stage. This artist moves through tours without burning out as fast. Effect: −10% stamina cost on all tours.

name: Side Hustle
description: Always finding ways to make money on the side. Earns a flat credit bonus at the end of every tour. Effect: +50 credits at the end of every tour.

name: Battle Hardened
description: This artist has seen it all. Terrible outcomes hit a little less hard. Effect: −25% credit loss from BAD and TERRIBLE outcomes.

name: Collab King
description: Thrives alongside other artists. Earns a payout bonus when the lineup has more than one artist type. Effect: +15% payout when the lineup contains at least one other artist type.

name: Grind Mentality
description: No days off. This artist's relentless work ethic gives them a permanently higher stamina pool. Effect: +10 max stamina permanently.

name: Street Cred
description: Even a bad night keeps the reputation intact. Softens the blow of the worst concert outcomes. Effect: −20% penalty on TERRIBLE payout outcomes.

name: Stage Diver
description: Unpredictable and electric. Great shows pay out more, but this artist plays with fire every night. Effect: +30% on GREAT payouts and +30% to BAD penalties.

name: Encore Machine
description: Leaves the crowd wanting more every time. Earns a bonus when a concert ends on a high. Effect: +25% credits when the concert ends with crowd meter ≥ 75%.

name: Burnout Prone
description: Performs with everything they have, every night. More stamina than most, but burns out faster. Effect: +20 max stamina, but retirement risk is increased by 40%.

name: Amp It Up
description: Gets better as the tour goes on. Payouts grow with each concert completed in a single tour. Effect: +10% payout per concert completed in a single tour.
